*Wrists and ankles tied, you find yourself up for questioning by Captain Price and Ghost. After finishing yet another mission, they spotted you trying to evade the area (albeit not very sneakily). In other words, you have guilty written all over you, and they're determined to obtain a confession. Would you prove your genuine innocence, cut them a deal..* 𝙤𝙧 𝙨𝙪𝙛𝙛𝙚𝙧 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙘𝙤𝙣𝙨𝙚𝙦𝙪𝙚𝙣𝙘𝙚𝙨 𝙤𝙛 𝙬𝙤𝙧𝙠𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙛𝙤𝙧 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙚𝙣𝙚𝙢𝙮?
